# metro

Prepare local Metro runtime

## Usage

```bash
agent-device metro prepare --public-base-url <url> [--project-root <path>] [--port <port>] [--kind auto|react-native|expo]
```

## Session Requirement

Does not require an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--project-root <path>`: metro prepare: React Native project root (default: cwd)
- `--kind auto|react-native|expo`: metro prepare: detect or force the Metro launcher kind
- `--public-base-url <url>`: metro prepare: public base URL used to build bundle hints
- `--proxy-base-url <url>`: metro prepare: optional remote host bridge base URL for Metro access
- `--bearer-token <token>`: metro prepare: host bridge bearer token (prefer AGENT_DEVICE_PROXY_TOKEN or AGENT_DEVICE_METRO_BEARER_TOKEN)
- `--port <port>`: metro prepare: local Metro port (default: 8081)
- `--listen-host <host>`: metro prepare: host Metro listens on (default: 0.0.0.0)
- `--status-host <host>`: metro prepare: host used for local /status polling (default: 127.0.0.1)
- `--startup-timeout-ms <ms>`: metro prepare: timeout while waiting for Metro to become ready
- `--probe-timeout-ms <ms>`: metro prepare: timeout for /status and proxy bridge calls
- `--runtime-file <path>`: metro prepare: optional file path to persist the JSON result
- `--no-reuse-existing`: metro prepare: always start a fresh Metro process
- `--no-install-deps`: metro prepare: skip package-manager install when node_modules is missing

## Platform Coverage

_Capability checks are not defined for this command in `command-schema.ts`._
